error_signature: Incorrect String. Hint: A string value must always be enclosed in double quotes
title: Incorrect String error in JSON quiz workflow
symptom: The user receives an 'Incorrect String' error when attempting to validate their JSON input, despite matching the answer key exactly.
applies_when: Using an if node in the JSON quiz workflow
The string values are correctly formatted
not_this_if: The error occurs in a different node or workflow context
root_cause: The if node may have become corrupted or misconfigured, leading to validation errors even when the input appears correct. This can happen due to previous edits or issues during node creation.
fix_steps: Delete the existing if node from the workflow
Set the same conditions as the original if node
agent_instruction: Replace the existing if node with a new one and reconfigure it with the same conditions.
